response.justification: The candidate is technically strong and covers nearly every required skill — TypeScript, Node.js, React, REST APIs, SQL, Kubernetes, and even the nice-to-have LLM/MCP and AWS experience. However, this is an entry-level junior/mid role, and the candidate has roughly 18 years of experience at senior and staff level, creating a significant overqualification risk in terms of compensation expectations, engagement, and retention. Additionally, the candidate is based in Bucharest while the role requires high on-site presence, which is a practical blocker unless relocation is confirmed.
strengths: Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node.js experience with React, REST APIs, and relational databases
Hands-on LLM/AI-agent tooling (MCP) and Kubernetes/Docker experience matching nice-to-haves
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, testing) aligned with clean architecture interest
concerns: Heavily overqualified for an entry-level position — likely salary and retention mismatch
Based in Bucharest, conflicting with the high on-site presence requirement
Primary database experience is MongoDB; PostgreSQL and Nest.js not explicitly demonstrated

key_factors.factor: Complete technical skill coverage incl. nice-to-haves
